headline: Aluminum’s War Shock Blunted by Dark Transits and Chinese Supply
summary: (Bloomberg) -- The Iran war caused one of the biggest supply shocks to ever hit the aluminum market, but the runaway price surge that many were bracing for has been blunted by the ingenuity of producers from the Middle East to China.
